scripts.dev:gym1: grep -v '^DATABASE_URL\|^NEXTAUTH_URL' envs/gym1.env > .env.local && echo 'DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/traqgym_gym1?schema=public' >> .env.local && echo 'NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3001' >> .env.local && next dev -p 3001
scripts.dev:gym2: grep -v '^DATABASE_URL\|^NEXTAUTH_URL' envs/gym2.env > .env.local && echo 'DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5434/traqgym_gym2?schema=public' >> .env.local && echo 'NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3002' >> .env.local && next dev -p 3002
scripts.db:setup:gym1: DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/traqgym_gym1?schema=public npx prisma db push && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/traqgym_gym1?schema=public NEXT_PUBLIC_GYM_NAME='EGym Lokhandwala' npx tsx prisma/seed-prod.ts
scripts.db:setup:gym2: DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5434/traqgym_gym2?schema=public npx prisma db push && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5434/traqgym_gym2?schema=public NEXT_PUBLIC_GYM_NAME='GymSpirit' npx tsx prisma/seed-prod.ts
scripts.db:reset: npx prisma db push --force-reset && npm run db:seed
